close_reason: Added to flake.nix packages and registry, toolchain.toml
description:
Update flake.nix and registry:
1. Add pydeps-gen to packages in flake.nix
2. Add pydeps-gen to registry mapping
3. Add to toolchain.toml if needed for shell availability
4. Test that 'pydeps-gen --help' works in dev shell
title: Add pydeps-gen to toolchain registry
